description:
A Link Between Worlds is a game in the classic Legend of Zelda series,
and a sequel to A Link to the Past. Explore dungeons, fight monsters,
discover magical items, and save the worlds of Hyrule and Lorule!

v0.1.2.description:
**Note**: The installation instructions have changed: now you put the albwrandomizer *folder* in the lib folder. If you have an albwrandomizer *file* from a previous version, remove it.

Changes
- Starting weapon cannot be placed in sand rod slot
- Lamp and net do not count as starting weapons unless "Lamp and Net as Weapons" is on
- "Minigames Excluded" option now also excludes maiamai inside Rupee Rush
- Swamp Palace and Eastern Palace weather vanes randomize correctly when vanes are shuffled
- Fix bug where items get sent when starting a new save
- Bogus error messages no longer appear in client
- Game no longer crashes in credits
- Compatibility with Python 3.12 and Mac OS
- Update to latest version of upstream randomizer, meaning Premium Milk crash is fixed, and Ravio now tells you how many portraits are required
v0.1.2.title: v0.1.2

v0.1.3.description:
Changes
- Implement Chest Size Matches Contents option
- Implement Crack Shuffle option
- Speed up collection of junk items
- Ravio only generates hints for progression or useful items
- Fix crash when emulator is opened while connected to the multiworld
- Options added to slot data
- Patcher opens a console window
v0.1.3.title: v0.1.3

v0.1.4.description:
**Installation Note**: The albwrandomizer library is now included in the apworld and does not need to be installed separately.

- Update to work on AP 0.6.5
- Add support for playing on 3DS (@LittleCube-hax, @hatkirby)
v0.1.4.title: v0.1.4

v0.1.5.description:
- Fixes a bug that can prevent the apworld from loading
- The client can be launched by a desktop shortcut

This version is compatible with games generated on 0.1.3 and 0.1.4.
v0.1.5.title: v0.1.5

v0.2.0.description:
## New Features
- Mother Maiamai may now give 9 checks. Each requires a Ravio item and also has a maiamai threshold that must be reached before the item can be obtained. Use option `shuffle_maiamai_rewards` to control whether Mother Maiamai checks are included, and use option `maiamai_limit` to set the maximum possible number of required maiamai.
- Hint ghosts now provide hints. Set `hint_ghosts` to `always` to enable them, or set to `glasses` to enable them once you have received the Hint Glasses.
- Death Link is now an available option. (@Bloonie)
- New `initial_crack_state` option `progressive` replaces the bracelets with two Progressive Merge items. The first one you get gives you the activated bracelet, and the second one gives you the quake that opens the cracks.
- Option `priority_bosses` makes all boss heart containers into priority locations.
- Setting `mod_path` in `host.yaml` to the path to your Azahar `load/mods` folder or your `luma/titles` folder allows the patcher to install the mod automatically (optional).

## Changes
- Accessing the Eastern Palace boss without both small keys is moved to Hard logic.
- Option `minigames_excluded` now removes minigame locations from the pool.
- Desert Palace logic changed to prevent a self-locking key.
- Region hint names changed to match standalone randomizer hints.

## Fixes
- Fixed an error when running from WebHost.
- Improved speed of pre_fill step.
v0.2.0.title: v0.2.0

v0.2.1.description: The previous release came with the wrong version of the library, this release fixes that.
v0.2.1.title: v0.2.1

v0.2.2.description:
This release is backward compatible with v0.2.1.

Changes:
- Improvements to auto tracking
- Option `start_inventory_from_pool` now available
- Automatic hinting of Street Merchant and Mother Maiamai items (if progression or useful)
- Faster patching times
- Change to the way the library is unpacked that should hopefully reduce bugs
v0.2.2.title: v0.2.2

v0.2.3.description: This release reverts the patching changes from the previous version, which caused the patcher to fail on some systems.
v0.2.3.title: v0.2.3

v0.3.0.description:
### New Features
- Small keys, big keys, and compasses can be shuffled outside of their dungeons. The "Keysy" option is no longer its own option as it has been merged with the key shuffle options.
- New `nice_items` option `upgrades` shuffles 9 item upgrades into the pool. These item upgrades do nothing unless you also receive the item itself, in which case they give you the nice version of the item. New `super_items` option `upgrades` does the same with super items.

### Changes
- Reworked 3DS connection code to reduce errors.
- Patcher shows a loading bar and writes to a log file.
- Colors of rupees in shops are now correct.
v0.3.0.title: v0.3.0

v0.3.1.description: Fixes a regression that made the apworld incompatible with the Citra emulator. This release is backward compatible with v0.3.0.
v0.3.1.title: v0.3.1

v0.3.2.description:
This version is backward compatible with 0.3.x.
- Fixes a bug where a newly created save file may be reported as invalid
- Change to client to prevent possible item duplication
v0.3.2.title: v0.3.2
